raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Sauls redſeja/ 
la tas lohti gudri turrejahs/ tad 
bihjajahs tas preeſch winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet wiſs Iſraels un Iuhda 
mihleja Dahwidu/ jo tas igahje 
un eegahje winnu Preekcha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Sauls faztija us Dah-
widu: Rangi/es dohſchu tew man-
nu leelakn Mettu Merabu par 
Seewu/ turrajs tikkat prett man 
ka weens ſirdige Dchis/ un uſ-
neim ta KUNGA Ratru. Jo 
Sauls dohmaja manna Rohka 
prett winnu ne buhs/ bet laid to 
Wilistexu Rohka prett win-
nu irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Dahwids faztija us 
Saulu : Kahds es efmu? un kah-
da irr manna Dſihwoſchana/ un 
manna Tehwa Rads eekſch Iſra-
etu/ ka man bij tam Kehnizam 
par Snohtu tapt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kad tas Laiks nahze/
ka Dahwidam Meraba Saula 
Metta dohta taptu/ tad tappe ta 
Adriektam tam Meolatitexam par 
Seewu dohta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Mikale Saula Met-
ta mihleja Dahwidu. Kad tas 
Saulam tappe fluddinahts/ tad 
tas bija winnam gann parcift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Sauls faztija: Es doh-
schu winnam to/ ka ta winnam 
par Walgu effott/ kad to Wilis-
texu Rohka pahr winnu nahk. 
Tapehz faztija Sauls usDahwi-
du : Ar to ohtru buhsi tu man 
ſchodeen par Snohtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Sauls pawehleja to 
weem Kalpeem : Runnajeet 
Dahwidu kluffinam/ un fakkaj 
Rangi/ tam Kehnizam irr la 
Prahts pee tewi/ un wiſſi wi 
na Kalpi tew mihto/ tohpi ta 
tam Kehnizam par Snohtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Saula Kalpi runna 
ſchohs Wahrdus preeſch Da-
wida Aufim : Bet Dahwids ta-
zija: Ar ta masa Leeta preeſ-
juhsahm Azzim/ tam Kehniza-
par Snohtu tapt? fur es wee-
nabbags un paſemmigs Wihs-
eimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Saula Kalpi stabſi-
winnam to/ fazzidami: Ta a-
ta irr Dahwids runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad faztija Sauls: Sa-
kajt Dahwidam ta/ tam Keh-
nain ne grihbahs Krohnu-Na-
da/ bet fimts Preekſch-Ahdas 
Wilistexu/ ka atreebtees warr-
ta Kehnina Genaidneekem.
Sauls dohmaja Dahwidu de-
deht zaur to Wilistexu Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad patazzija winni Ka-
pi Dahwidam ſchohs Wahrdu-
un Dahwids ſchitte ſcho Lee-
gann labbu effam/ tam Keh-
nain par Snohtu tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tahs Deenas wehl-
bija pa Gallam/ tad zehlehſ Da-
wids/un nogahje ar fatweem Wi-
reem/ un nokawe no teem Wi-
stereem diwiſimts Wihrus-
un Dahwids atneffe win-
Preekſch-Ahdas/ un tahs tap-
tam Kehnizam papillam dohta-
ka wiach ta Kehniza Sno-
tapt
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
